All items are free! We've decluttered our home recently and have some small odds and ends we're giving away to anyone who could use them. Nothing major or collectable, but maybe you can find something useful to you. One person's trash can be another's treasure! Biggest item is a blue area rug (about 6' x 8'). We will have the items out on a table by our garage, which is accessible from the shared driveway (the one with the sign for 332, 334 and 336). We are three houses down on the right side.  If you decide to come by, please park on the street, NOT THE SHARED DRIVEWAY, so our neighbors garages are not blocked.
Start time is 8am on Saturday and Sunday. No early-birds please. If you come early, there will be nothing out for you to look at! Items will be out until about 5pm.
Happy garage saling!

- Kids Clothing: Boys 4-6, Girls 6-10, PJs/Kids 4-10
- Women’s Clothing: Plus size, L-1X, mostly tops and dresses
- Men’s Clothing: 2X-3X, mostly geeky t-shirts
- Kids toys: puzzles, young elementary age, paw patrol city area rug
- books: cookbooks, reference books, some kids books, summer practice workbooks
- board games: LOTS! Many new and unopened, hard to find, and kickstarter exclusives - including a complete unused Blooborne with all expansions
- geeky collectibles: Funkos, figurines, pins
- home decor/art: photo canvases, paintings, wall art, decor
- Kitchen/Dining: linens, placemats, baking items
- small electronics: Echo Dot, surge protectors, USB cables
